query:
INSERT INTO sub_committees (
            committee_session_id,
            data_entry_id,
            number,
            name,
            category
        ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        RETURNING
            id AS "id: _",
            committee_session_id AS "committee_session_id: _",
            data_entry_id AS "data_entry_id!: _",
            number AS "number: SubCommitteeNumber",
            name,
            category AS "category: _"
